title: Remove support-related text from Subscription tab

requirements.text: Remove the support-related phrases "Community support", "Priority Support", and "Dedicated Support" so they no longer appear anywhere in the Subscription tab UI (including the tier features list rendering).

quotes: Fully remove the texts from Subscription - i dont do ANY Support ever in my life: "Community support", "Priority Support" and "Dedicated Support".

acceptanceCriteria: When viewing Settings → Subscription, none of the strings "Community support", "Priority Support", or "Dedicated Support" appear in the UI.
Subscription tier cards still render normally (features list shows all other entries unchanged), and subscribing flow remains unaffected.
A repository-wide search limited to the Subscription tab rendering path confirms these phrases are not rendered by Subscription UI anymore (e.g., filtered out before display).

constraints: Use English for any user-facing text.

Frontend immutable paths must not be modified: frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.tsx, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, frontend/src/components/ui (compose-only).
nonGoals: Do not change backend tier data, Stripe logic, or subscription pricing behavior.
Do not modify routing, admin gating, or other Settings tabs beyond the Subscription UI text removal.
